market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to this lovely 4-bedroom apartment at Crosshills, perfect for up to 4 guests. This modern serviced apartment boasts a cozy atmosphere, making it ideal for a family vacation or a business trip. Its central location provides easy access to local amenities, including restaurants, shops, and transport links. The apartment features a spacious living area and a fully equipped kitchen. Each bedroom has ample storage and is designed to provide a comfortable night's sleep. As a guest, you'll have access to shared laundry facilities and secure parking. With its high rating of 4.28 out of 5 from 79 reviews, this apartment is the perfect choice for a comfortable and memorable stay.
top_amenity_gaps: Parking and secure storage facilities to cater to guests with cars
An outdoor space or garden for relaxing and socializing
Entertainment facilities, such as a flat-screen TV or streaming device
analysis.photo_order_rec: The living area should be the cover photo, showcasing the spacious and cozy atmosphere. This will provide potential guests with an instant understanding of the apartment's comfort and livability.
key_diagnosis: Increase occupancy by targeting guests who book longer stays, as there are 76 open nights on the calendar.
Improve the listing's rating and appeal by adding a photo-per-view ratio of at least 1.4, considering the unknown photo count.
Implement the suggested title variant 'Charming 4 Bed Apartment at Crosshills' to lead with a stronger differentiator and entice potential guests.
analysis.outreach_hook: With 76 open nights on the calendar, there's a missed opportunity to fill available dates and maximize revenue. A reworked title and photo strategy can help attract more guests.
